subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath revealed the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, and Who hath fulfilled that which He promised His servants in His Book through the tongues of His Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و و انجز ما وعد به عباده فی کتابه بالسن رسله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
